questions.label: Phase
questions.prompt: In Accumulation or Early Bull on macro cycle?
questions.guidance: Look at logarithmic regression band + risk metric. Avoid Late Bull / Euphoria entries.

questions.label: Macro
questions.prompt: Macro liquidity environment supportive (Fed pivots, DXY weakness)?
questions.guidance: Global M2 growth, DXY < 100 trending down, real yields softening.

questions.label: Risk Band
questions.prompt: Cowen risk metric < 0.5 for accumulation, or trending down from peak?

questions.label: Dominance
questions.prompt: BTC dominance behaviour aligned with thesis (rising → BTC, falling → alts)?

questions.label: ETH/BTC
questions.prompt: ETH/BTC trend supportive of the bet (rising favours alts/ETH; falling favours BTC)?

questions.label: On-Chain
questions.prompt: Healthy on-chain signals (active addresses, TVL, fees) trending up?

questions.label: Behavioural
questions.prompt: Sentiment positioning supportive (extreme fear in accumulation, not euphoria)?
questions.guidance: Crypto Fear & Greed < 30 for accumulation. > 80 in distribution.
